steps.title: Identify favorable outcomes
steps.content: There are $53$ participants with more than $120$ minutes of REM sleep out of $59$ participants total.

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content: The probability is favorable outcomes divided by total outcomes: $$\frac{53}{59}$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct value is $\frac{53}{59}$, so C is correct.
